requirements.task_name: Bookmark an affordable AI conference in Europe for late 2025
requirements.task_description: Find an international AI-related conference in Europe happening between September and December 2025 with a student registration fee under $250 and add it to your bookmarks list.

requirements.task_name: Create a one-day schedule with three climate sessions across multiple tracks
requirements.task_description: Within a selected conference, build a personal schedule for a specific day by adding 3 sessions related to climate change that occur between 9:00 and 17:00, ensuring they cover at least 2 different tracks.
existing_variables: // which sessions user added to their schedule
// session metadata: title, abstract, keywords, start/end times, dayIndex, conferenceId, trackId
// track information for verifying multiple tracks

requirements.task_name: Follow a mid-career researcher in machine learning for healthcare from Canada
requirements.task_description: Find a researcher whose expertise is machine learning for healthcare, based in Canada, with an h-index between 30 and 60, and add them to your followed researchers list.

requirements.task_name: Add three recent open-access renewable energy policy papers to a reading list
requirements.task_description: Search for open-access publications on renewable energy policy from 2021–2024 in journals with an impact factor above 5, then add the first three matching results to your reading list.
existing_variables: // title, abstract, keywords, year, accessType, journalImpactFactor, journalId
// impactFactor for journals when not present on publication

requirements.task_name: Pre-register as a guest for an affordable half-day data visualization workshop
requirements.task_description: Find a half-day workshop on data visualization with a fee under $150, choose the morning option if multiple time slots are offered, and complete the pre-registration form using guest registration without making a payment.
existing_variables: // registrations with eventId, timeSlotId, registrationType, paymentOption, isPreRegistration, fullName, email
// eventType, durationType, baseFeeAmount, baseFeeCurrency, topics/title for 'data visualization'
// slot times for checking a 'morning' selection

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to weekly AI ethics and climate policy newsletters with HTML format
requirements.task_description: Use the newsletter preferences page to subscribe to both the "AI Ethics" and "Climate Policy" newsletters with a weekly frequency using the same email address, and configure the delivery format as HTML.
existing_variables: // per-email, per-topic records: frequency, format, isActive
// defines available topics for cross-checking topic names if needed

requirements.task_name: Make an anonymous $75 donation to the Early Career Research Grants program
requirements.task_description: Use the donations page to make a one-time $75 donation allocated fully to the 'Early Career Research Grants' program, selecting anonymous donation and opting out of physical mail.
existing_variables: // donation drafts with type, amount, currency, programId, isAnonymous, communicationPreference, status
// program metadata to identify 'Early Career Research Grants'

requirements.task_name: Choose the most economical membership plan that still includes key benefits
requirements.task_description: Compare the Student and Professional membership plans, choose the plan with the lower annual cost that still includes both 'access to member-only webinars' and 'discounted conference fees', and begin the application by completing the initial form step.
existing_variables: // plan metadata including name (Student/Professional), annualPriceAmount, annualPriceCurrency, benefits
// started applications with planId, fullName, email, country, roleOrStatus, status
